title.en: EHT Channel Access & 320 MHz Protection: MU-RTS/CTS and BSS PPDU Classification
title.zh: EHT 信道接入与 320 MHz 保护：MU-RTS/CTS 与 BSS PPDU 分类

blocks.en: Wi-Fi 7 (EHT) can grab an enormously wide channel — up to 320 MHz. But wide channels are fragile: the more spectrum you claim, the more likely some slice of it is already busy with a microwave oven, a radar, or a neighbouring network. EHT also lets an access point deliberately punch holes in its channel (preamble puncturing), so a 320 MHz channel might really be '320 MHz minus a 40 MHz dead zone'. Protecting a transmission opportunity (TXOP) across all that bandwidth needs a smarter handshake than the simple RTS/CTS of older Wi-Fi.
blocks.zh: Wi-Fi 7（EHT）可以占用极宽的信道——最高达 320 MHz。但越宽的信道越脆弱：你声明的频谱越多，其中某一小段就越可能已被微波炉、雷达或邻居网络占用。EHT 还允许接入点（AP）有意地在自己的信道里“打洞”（前导码打孔，preamble puncturing），于是一个 320 MHz 信道实际上可能是“320 MHz 减去一段 40 MHz 的死区”。要在这么宽的带宽上保护一次发送机会（TXOP），就需要比旧版 Wi-Fi 那种简单 RTS/CTS 更聪明的握手。

blocks.en: EHT's answer is the MU-RTS Trigger frame. Instead of one RTS asking 'is the whole channel clear?', the AP sends a single MU-RTS that names exactly which 20 MHz subchannels it wants protected and which station(s) should answer. Each addressed station replies with a CTS, but only on the subchannels it actually finds usable — punctured subchannels are skipped, and any 20 MHz slice that fails its carrier-sense check is left silent. The result is a CTS 'fence' built only around the spectrum that is genuinely clear and usable, right now.
blocks.zh: EHT 的答案是 MU-RTS 触发帧（MU-RTS Trigger frame）。AP 不再用一个 RTS 去问“整个信道空闲吗？”，而是发送单个 MU-RTS，精确地点名它想要保护哪些 20 MHz 子信道、以及哪个（些）站点应当应答。每个被点名的站点都回复一个 CTS，但只在它实际判断为可用的子信道上回复——被打孔的子信道会被跳过，任何一段没通过载波侦听检查的 20 MHz 也保持静默。最终得到的，是一道只围绕“此刻确实空闲且可用”频谱筑起的 CTS“围栏”。

blocks.en: The rule is strict: an MU-RTS Trigger frame must not solicit a CTS within any bandwidth that contains a punctured 20 MHz subchannel from a legacy HE (Wi-Fi 6) station — those older stations cannot represent the holes. And whenever the carrier is 320 MHz wide or punctured, the AP is forced to use the newer EHT-variant User Info field, because only it can describe the gap pattern.
blocks.zh: 规则很严格：当某段带宽中包含被打孔的 20 MHz 子信道时，MU-RTS 触发帧不得向旧式 HE（Wi-Fi 6）站点索要 CTS——那些旧站点无法表示这些“洞”。而只要载波是 320 MHz 宽或带有打孔，AP 就被强制使用更新的 EHT 变体 User Info 字段，因为只有它才能描述这种空隙图样。

caption.en: The MU-RTS names 20 MHz subchannels; the CTS comes back only on the usable ones, fencing off a possibly-punctured 320 MHz TXOP.
caption.zh: MU-RTS 点名各 20 MHz 子信道；CTS 只在可用的子信道上返回，从而为一个可能被打孔的 320 MHz TXOP 围出受保护范围。

blocks.en:
sequenceDiagram
    participant AP as EHT AP
    participant STA as EHT STA(s)
    Note over AP: holds a 320 MHz (maybe punctured) TXOP
    AP->>STA: MU-RTS Trigger (names subchannels, EHT User Info)
    Note over STA: carrier-sense each 20 MHz; drop punctured ones
    STA->>AP: CTS (only on usable subchannels)
    Note over AP,STA: NAV set; protected TXOP now spans only the fenced spectrum
    AP->>STA: DATA within bandwidth <= the CTS bandwidth
blocks.zh:
sequenceDiagram
    participant AP as EHT AP
    participant STA as EHT 站点
    Note over AP: 持有一个 320 MHz（可能打孔）TXOP
    AP->>STA: MU-RTS 触发帧 (点名子信道, EHT User Info)
    Note over STA: 对每个 20 MHz 载波侦听; 跳过打孔的
    STA->>AP: CTS (仅在可用子信道上)
    Note over AP,STA: 设置 NAV; 受保护 TXOP 仅覆盖被围起的频谱
    AP->>STA: DATA, 带宽 <= CTS 的带宽

blocks.en: Protection only helps if a station knows whose traffic it is hearing. EHT keeps the existing rule for telling intra-BSS (my own network's) PPDUs from inter-BSS (a neighbour's) ones, because that decision drives both NAV setting and spatial reuse — you back off for your own AP but may safely ignore and transmit over a faraway neighbour. EHT adds one tweak for access points: an AP must classify a received EHT MU PPDU as inter-BSS unless it is an EHT SU transmission with the uplink flag clear. In short, if it looks like a downlink multi-user frame and you're an AP, treat it as someone else's network.
blocks.zh: 保护只有在站点知道自己听到的是“谁的”流量时才有意义。EHT 保留了既有规则，用来区分 intra-BSS（本网络）与 inter-BSS（邻居网络）的 PPDU，因为这个判断同时驱动 NAV 设置和空间复用——对自己的 AP 你要退避，但对远处的邻居你可以安全地忽略并照常发送。EHT 为 AP 增加了一处微调：AP 必须把收到的 EHT MU PPDU 判定为 inter-BSS，除非它是一次上行标志为 0 的 EHT SU 发送。简而言之：如果它看起来像一个下行多用户帧，而你又是 AP，那就把它当成别人网络的流量。

summary.en: The exact MU-RTS/CTS, puncturing and classification rules
summary.zh: MU-RTS/CTS、打孔与分类的精确规则

blocks.en: Clause 35.2.1.1 covers bandwidth signaling for STA 6G Control/CTS frames in non-HT duplicate format and how the Disabled Subchannel Bitmap in the EHT Operation element drives the TXVECTOR INACTIVE_SUBCHANNELS parameter. The MU-RTS Trigger/CTS exchange (35.2.2) builds on 26.2.6.2/26.2.6: when the carrier is 320 MHz or punctured, the User Info field addressed to the EHT STA must be EHT-variant (35.2.2.1); an MU-RTS must not solicit a CTS from an HE STA within a bandwidth containing a punctured 20 MHz subchannel; and the AP transmitting the MU-RTS must not puncture beyond the Disabled Subchannel Bitmap. On response (35.2.2.2), an EHT STA addressed by an EHT-variant User Info field sends the CTS in the indicated RU, excluding any punctured 20 MHz subchannel, with the UL MU CS condition determined per 35.5.2.4. For classification (35.2.3) an EHT STA follows 26.2.2, except a classifying AP shall mark a received PPDU inter-BSS if it is an EHT MU PPDU that is not an EHT SU transmission with RXVECTOR UPLINK_FLAG equal to 0.
blocks.zh: 35.2.1.1 节规定了 STA 6G 在 non-HT duplicate 格式下 Control/CTS 帧的带宽信令，以及 EHT Operation 元素中的 Disabled Subchannel Bitmap 如何驱动 TXVECTOR 的 INACTIVE_SUBCHANNELS 参数。MU-RTS 触发/CTS 交换（35.2.2）建立在 26.2.6.2/26.2.6 之上：当载波为 320 MHz 或带有打孔时，发给 EHT 站点的 User Info 字段必须是 EHT 变体（35.2.2.1）；MU-RTS 不得在包含被打孔 20 MHz 子信道的带宽内向 HE 站点索要 CTS；发送 MU-RTS 的 AP 也不得在 Disabled Subchannel Bitmap 之外额外打孔。在应答侧（35.2.2.2），被 EHT 变体 User Info 字段点名的 EHT 站点须在所指示的 RU 上发送 CTS，并排除任何被打孔的 20 MHz 子信道，其 UL MU CS 条件按 35.5.2.4 确定。对于分类（35.2.3），EHT 站点遵循 26.2.2，但作为分类方的 AP，若收到的 PPDU 是一个并非 RXVECTOR UPLINK_FLAG 等于 0 的 EHT SU 发送的 EHT MU PPDU，则应将其标记为 inter-BSS。

cites.note: 35.2.1 EHT channel access / TXOP — bandwidth signaling and Disabled Subchannel Bitmap -> INACTIVE_SUBCHANNELS
35.2.2 MU-RTS Trigger/CTS exchange — EHT-variant User Info for 320 MHz/punctured; no CTS from HE STA over punctured subchannels; CTS excludes punctured 20 MHz
35.2.3 Intra-BSS and inter-BSS PPDU classification for EHT STA — AP marks an EHT MU PPDU inter-BSS unless EHT SU with UPLINK_FLAG=0
